prompt: Create an FAQ section with a heading that says 'Frequently Asked Questions'. Below it, add an accordion with 4 items: 'What is Tale UI?' with answer about it being a design system, 'How do I install it?' with pnpm install instructions, 'Is it accessible?' with answer about React Aria foundation, and 'Can I customize the theme?' with answer about CSS custom properties. At the bottom, add an info banner with a description that says 'Still have questions?' and a link labeled 'Contact us'.
reference:
import { Text } from '@tale-ui/react/text';
import { Accordion } from '@tale-ui/react/accordion';
import { Banner } from '@tale-ui/react/banner';
import { Link } from '@tale-ui/react/link';
import { Column } from '@tale-ui/react/column';

export function AccordionFaq() {
  return (
    <Column gap="l">
      <Text variant="heading" size="m">Frequently Asked Questions</Text>
      <Accordion.Root>
        <Accordion.Item id="what">
          <Accordion.Header>
            <Accordion.Trigger>What is Tale UI?</Accordion.Trigger>
          </Accordion.Header>
          <Accordion.Panel>
            Tale UI is a comprehensive design system and component library built with React and CSS custom properties. It provides a consistent set of accessible, themeable UI components.
          </Accordion.Panel>
        </Accordion.Item>
        <Accordion.Item id="install">
          <Accordion.Header>
            <Accordion.Trigger>How do I install it?</Accordion.Trigger>
          </Accordion.Header>
          <Accordion.Panel>
            Install via pnpm: pnpm add @tale-ui/react @tale-ui/react-styles. Then import the components you need and the stylesheet.
          </Accordion.Panel>
        </Accordion.Item>
        <Accordion.Item id="accessible">
          <Accordion.Header>
            <Accordion.Trigger>Is it accessible?</Accordion.Trigger>
          </Accordion.Header>
          <Accordion.Panel>
            Yes. Tale UI is built on top of React Aria Components, which provides robust accessibility support including keyboard navigation, screen reader announcements, and ARIA attributes out of the box.
          </Accordion.Panel>
        </Accordion.Item>
        <Accordion.Item id="customize">
          <Accordion.Header>
            <Accordion.Trigger>Can I customize the theme?</Accordion.Trigger>
          </Accordion.Header>
          <Accordion.Panel>
            Absolutely. The entire design system is driven by CSS custom properties. You can override color tokens, spacing, typography, and more by setting custom property values in your stylesheet.
          </Accordion.Panel>
        </Accordion.Item>
      </Accordion.Root>
      <Banner.Root variant="info">
        <Banner.Description>
          Still have questions? <Link href="#">Contact us</Link>
        </Banner.Description>
      </Banner.Root>
    </Column>
  );
}
